title: Forti shields
description: Fortishields expands your defensive options by adding new shields to the game.
body:
**Fortishields expands your defensive options by adding new shields to the game. These shields fit naturally into Minecraft’s progression, giving you more variety without introducing new mechanics.**

**Features**
- New shields for your journey
- Balanced progression alongside vanilla gear
- Simple, no extra mechanics just craft and block
- Fits seamlessly into Minecraft survival gameplay

**More shields to come!**

 

 
**Come join my discord to leave suggestions and report bugs or.. complain to me** 😁
[Klaxxan's Workshop](https://discord.gg/2eGDH997DR)
